name: DHEA
summary: DHEA is a steroid hormone precursor with moderate human evidence for select aging-related outcomes and important endocrine safety limits.
description: DHEA is an adrenal steroid precursor that can shift downstream androgen/estrogen balance; benefits may be population-specific and safety depends on hormonal context.
safetyNotes: Hormonal adverse effects possible, including acne and androgenic effects; avoid in hormone-sensitive cancers unless medically supervised.
